lines: Track what's new — every install now shows a sheet of changes since you last opened the app
ElevenLabs Scribe transcripts now actually work — fixed the bogus polling endpoint and bumped the timeout to ten minutes
Big audio files no longer pre-upload from the device; ElevenLabs fetches them via source_url instead
Home now reads agent picks aloud and explains why each one was chosen
Threaded Today pill and topic-pivot lenses let you jump between angles on a story without leaving Home
Audio no longer cuts out when the screen locks during playback
Player action chips collapsed to icon-only Liquid Glass buttons so the controls breathe
Segmented pickers everywhere now use the new Liquid Glass control with proper haptics
Removed serif fonts across the app — everything now uses one consistent rounded type ramp
Spotlight previews of episodes now show clean text snippets instead of raw HTML
Long-press any transcript line to ask the agent about that exact moment
Settings now has a Downloads Manager so you can see and free up space from cached episodes
Player accessibility, skip glyphs, and scrubber polished — the chrome finally feels finished
Today and Library merged into one editorial Home — dateline, filter chips, featured row, and your shows all in one surface
Episodes without a publisher transcript now auto-transcribe in the background via ElevenLabs Scribe
More playback-speed presets so you can dial in the exact pace you like
Fixed iTunes Search returning shows that wouldn't subscribe — the results now match by parsed feed URL
